title: Sprint history log
description: Append-only log at .scrum/sprint-history.json. Records one SprintSummary per completed Sprint. Writes go exclusively through scripts/scrum/append-sprint-history.sh; direct edits are blocked by pre-tool-use-scrum-state-guard.sh. Read by completion-gate.sh (sprint_review exit criterion), watchdog.sh (max_sprints accounting), the Textual dashboard, statusline.sh, and the autonomous morning report.

goal.description: Sprint Goal as set at planning.

pbis_completed.description: Number of PBIs that reached status 'done'.

pbis_total.description: Number of PBIs in the Sprint Backlog.
